title: Strong economic data in China boosts sentiment
section_path: Strong economic data in China boosts sentiment
section_path_text: Strong economic data in China boosts sentiment
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Better than expected economic data in China saw commodities rally across the board as hopes of a rebound in demand rose. This was aided by signs of stronger demand in other parts of Asia. Economic data highlight a stronger recovery in demand is imminent.
